meta.notes: Self-expanding query pool used by the weekly audit routine. Seeds are hand-curated from Meridian's services + suburbs. The routine re-checks each query against live search results every Saturday, harvests up to 5 new queries per run from Google autocomplete on the seeds that matter, and demotes queries that stop yielding useful signal. See docs/audit-dashboard-setup.md §6 for full routine prompt and self-expansion rules. 2026-05-22: autocomplete fetch (suggestqueries.google.com) is STILL blocked by the routine host egress allowlist — confirmed again this run via curl ('Host not in allowlist'). Workaround retained: pool self-expands via queries derived from previous-run SERP gaps (source: 'derived'). Durable fix = widen the routine egress allowlist to include suggestqueries.google.com and meridianosteopathy.co.nz. This run added 3 derived queries: 'post concussion osteopath christchurch' (ACC-adjacent variant of the concussion finding), 'lower back pain christchurch' (high-intent back-pain variant where competitors have specific URLs), 'tennis elbow osteopath christchurch' (tracks Nina's recently-added What I Treat tag). MILESTONE 2026-05-22: meridianosteopathy.co.nz appeared in the visible top 10 for the FIRST TIME in any tracked query — position 5 for 'osteopath vs physiotherapist christchurch'. Priority held at 30 per the 4-10 rank rule.
